controls.inner_text: BackgroundTransfer completion notifications allow apps to show a toast or update a tile once a set of operations complete.

controls.content: Start three downloads and show toast on completion
Start three downloads and update tile on completion

controls.inner_text: Execute a background task when a set of uploads or downloads completes.

controls.content: Start ten downloads in a completion group

controls.inner_text: The sample server provided with this sample provides a time-limited URL. If you check the box below, then when the URL expires, the app switches to different URL to continue downloading.

controls.text: The download URL has expired. Enter a new authorization code to resume the download.

controls.inner_text: Transfers which belong to the same transfer group can be reordered after they have been started.

controls.text: Select a pending transfer to reorder the downloads.
